title: prostanthera incurvata
intro: Prostanthera incurvata, also known as the curved-leaved lavender or curved-leaved mint bush, is a shrubby plant native to Western Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Prostanthera incurvata has been traditionally used to relieve digestive issues, colds, and respiratory problems, offering several health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Prostanthera incurvata can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
